name: PromptRoot Gateway
description: Exposes POST /api/prompt and GET /api/prompt/:jobId so PromptRoot can send prompts to Brace and poll for results (SDD-0002 Phase 0/3a).

jobTtlMs.description: How long to keep completed job results in memory (ms). Default: 86400000 (24h).

runTimeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for agent to complete a job (ms). Default: 300000 (5m).
